title: One Hand Better Combat
body:
This Datapack/mod of [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) causes several weapons that are used to 2 hands can be used with one hand (enabling being able to use totem, shield or other item in the secondary hand, even the same weapon in the secondary hand)

Now some weapons have some new attacks and, depending on the weapon, some may do more damage with a specific blow.

Example: the axe = now has a third attack that does 25% of additional damage (with its own distinctive animation)

Compatibility mods:
- [Armageddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/armageddon)
- [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae)
- [Born in Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
- [Call of Yucatán](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-of-yucutan)
- [Dungeon Now Loading](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeon-now-loading)
- [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm)
- [Illager Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illager-additions)
- [Illager invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion)
- [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)
- [Mowzie's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/mowzies-mobs)
- [Savage & Ravage](https://modrinth.com/mod/savage-and-ravage)
- [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)
- [Inka](https://modrinth.com/mod/inka)
- [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)
- ...and many other mods that adapt to existing categories in Better Combat
